forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address that you use for your account and we'll send you a password reset link.

emailSent.title: Forgot your password?
emailSent.subtitle: Enter the email address that you use for your account and we'll send you a password reset link.
emailSent.cardBody: We've sent you an email which you can use to reset your password. Check your spam folder if you haven't received it after a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: Forgot your password?
resetPassword.subtitle: Almost done, just enter your new password below.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.subtitle: Confirming the link from your inbox.

checkEmail.title: Almost there
checkEmail.intro: We have sent a verification message to your inbox. Open it and tap the link to confirm your email and start your journey.
checkEmail.cardBody: Click the link in that email when you are ready. It opens this site, verifies your address in one step, then takes you to your profile so you can begin.
checkEmail.spamHint: If you do not see it in a minute or two, check spam or promotions.

success.title: You changed password successfully!
success.subtitle: You can now log in with your new password.

login.registeredBanner: Account created. You can log in now.
login.errorMissing: Please enter your email and password.

register.errorTerms: Please agree to the terms and privacy policy.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errorRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.errorNetwork: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.

resetPassword.errorInvalidToken: Invalid or missing reset link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
resetPassword.errorNetwork: Unable to reach the server. Please try again.

verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing a token. Use the link from your email.
verifyEmail.successLoggedIn: Your email is verified. Starting your journey…
verifyEmail.successSignIn: Your email is verified. Sign in to open your profile.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Check your inbox for a new verification link.
